title: Horowitz, Cassian - Head of Strategic Communications and Digital at No.10 - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Horowitz left his role at No.10 in May 2024.  Head of Executive Digital Communications, Google LLC (USA)  Mr Horowitz sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Google LLC (USA). The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2025; with a planned start date in September 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Independent Consultancy and commissions  Mr Horowitz sought the Committee’s advice about setting up an independent consultancy. An accessible version of the letter can be found here and taking on a commission with:    Vedandta Resources ltd. (An accessible version of the letter is available here.)   The Office of Akshata Murty & Rishi Sunak (An accessible version of the letter is available here.)   "
